title: Abundance
body: [![Abnormals Core](https://bit.ly/mcacorebadge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/abnormals-core) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/440256241932173323?label=&color=516D26&labelColor=B76CCB&logo=Discord&logoColor=516D26&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/VzXSCFp) [![Twitter Follow](https://img.shields.io/twitter/follow/teamauroramods?label=&color=516D26&labelColor=B76CCB&logo=Twitter&logoColor=516D26&style=for-the-badge)](https://twitter.com/teamauroramods) [![All Features](https://img.shields.io/badge/-features-516D26?style=for-the-badge)](https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vSXP5RRX61jILKj5tj7CPQYD91HbB1tvR8oew03waNQywv40ezl3TzaTJ7Tt8k2uoE3xFH8vYF2MbEW/pub) ![divider](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/699373761455194162/816055655252754432/abundance.png) New flowers and flowery biomes! Abundance adds the Lavender Fields, a gorgeous new biome full of Jacaranda and Redbud trees, as well as a new material, Lavender! It also adds all sorts of new flowering things to existing biomes - new flowers, flowering Redbud trees, and Saguaro Cacti in Badlands biomes. **Compatible with:** - [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) - woodset compat and storage blocks for Lavender and Sunflower Seeds - [Buzzier Bees](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/buzzier-bees) - Lavender & Redbud beehives - [Environmental](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/environmental) - Lavender Slabfish **Full feature list can be found [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vSXP5RRX61jILKj5tj7CPQYD91HbB1tvR8oew03waNQywv40ezl3TzaTJ7Tt8k2uoE3xFH8vYF2MbEW/pub)** ![divider](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/699373761455194162/816055655252754432/abundance.png) [](https://nodecraft.com/r/aurora)
